_note: The real car: YASA P400R motor + BAMOCAR-PG-D3-700/400 inverter + 200-cell supercapacitor stack (600 V nominal). Mass/track from the 3YP spreadsheet except cg_x: shifted forward from an earlier ultra-rear estimate so the sandbox stays pitch-stable (no wheelie) under launch. Use this config for parameter studies.

_hardware_sources.motor: yasa-p400rdatasheet-rev-14.pdf (370 Nm @ 450 A, Kt = 0.822, 8000 rpm = 838 rad/s, 160 kW peak @ 700 V).
_hardware_sources.inverter: BAMOCAR-PG-D3-700/600 (UNITEK PG-D3 family, supply 12-700 V DC, peak 600 A_lo / 425 A RMS, continuous 280 A RMS). Upgraded from PG-D3-700/400 to match Paul's accumulator V_finish=400 V design target; same form factor, same NDrive software, drop-in replacement on the DC-link.
_hardware_sources.supercap_cell: Eaton/Maxwell C46W-3R0-0600 (3.0 V, 600 F, 0.7 mOhm ESR per cell), 200 cells in series -> 600 V, 3 F, 0.14 Ohm.
